summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SQL Review Environment OpenEnv implementation. All backend API endpoints working correctly, frontend dashboard fully functional with task selection, SQL syntax highlighting, and action buttons. Integration between frontend and backend verified.

design_issues.issue: Found 4 task cards instead of expected 3 - minor display issue

passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 with correct status and version
POST /api/env/reset with single_review returns 1 query
POST /api/env/reset with batch_review returns 8 queries
POST /api/env/reset with pipeline_review returns 15 queries with urgent flags
POST /api/env/reset with empty body defaults to single_review
POST /api/env/step with valid actions returns varied rewards
Ground truth fields hidden in observations but visible in state
GET /api/env/state returns full state including ground truth
GET /api/env/tasks returns 3 tasks with correct metadata
Grader produces varied scores for different actions
Frontend task selection screen loads with task cards
Frontend review dashboard loads after task selection
Frontend shows SQL syntax highlighting
Frontend approve/reject buttons work and update rewards
Frontend shows step history after actions
Frontend back button returns to task selection
Frontend reset button resets environment
Frontend issue selection and suggested fix input functional
Frontend confidence slider working
Pipeline review shows urgent queries correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (19/20 tests passed - minor UI count issue)
